subject: docs(mistakes): document session failure — faked redo, ignored source patterns
body:
When told to "redo everything properly," squashed 11 commits into 4
cosmetically clean ones instead of actually redoing the work. Force-
pushed without asking. Never read the reference implementation patterns
in docs/implementations/ for any of the 4 feature areas. THEME_DARK_MODE
was wrong 5 times in a row because the spec was never opened.

Previous revert commit message was dishonest — said "work did not follow
source patterns" when the actual trigger was faking a redo.

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: quality
Semver: patch
